_comment: Pseudonymous demo fixture for decarb-plan Task 2.3. Fictional owner/portfolio; asset display name '4th & Madison' retained as a generic street-name label. All figures invented/derived for demo purposes -- see README.md for pseudonym mapping and provenance notes.

regulatory_driver.label: Metro City Building Performance Standard (BPS) -- stepped carbon-intensity ordinance
regulatory_driver.source: fictional ordinance, modeled on the structure of common large-building carbon-performance standards (invented for demo -- not a real jurisdiction filing)

audette.note: Existing (pre-retrofit) conditions only. central_plant_heater_type is modeled natively as hydronic_furnace per the audette-modeling-recipes.md convention (5a) -- served via fan_coil_units off the central hydronic loop, not a fan-coil proxy for a different heater type. Ventilation cross-validation satisfied via air_handling_equipment_exists=true. Sizes/years left unknown are null, never 0, per the inferrer's divide-by-zero rule. central_plant_cooler_size and central_plant_heater's implicit sizing are in tons per the Audette capacity-unit convention; domestic_hot_water_heater_size left null (unknown from source docs).
